name: com.bidscube.sdk
description: Bidscube advertising for Unity — Direct SDK (C#) and AppLovin MAX mediation. Android: bundled MAX adapter + dual core AARs (lite no-IMA vs full with IMA), BidscubeAndroidExportSettings / FeatureSet, optional Maven core; AppLovin 13.x, UMP, Glide, Material; launcher desugaring by default. iOS: WebView plugins and CocoaPods BidscubeSDKAppLovin. UPM 1.0.10; Git tag v1.0.10.

samples.description: Example scenes and scripts demonstrating the Bidscube Unity SDK.
